_comment: Lightweight expected-facts manifest for the 3 smoke-test pieces. Used for REFERENCE-FREE pipeline quality checks (no ground-truth MusicXML available yet — Claude has no internet to fetch CPDL/IMSLP references). Records structural facts + header metadata read directly from page 1 of each PDF. expected_voice_count is the SINGING voices only; see notes for OMR gotchas (editorial reductions inflate detected staff counts).
_generated: 2026-06-14 from page-1 visual inspection of each source PDF

pieces.title: Cantate Domino
pieces.license_note: public-domain composition (Hassler d.1612); editor's engraving James Gibb — confirm reuse terms before publishing reference
pieces.notes: Clean SATB, good test for textual dynamics extraction and a mid-piece meter change.

pieces.title: If ye love me
pieces.license_note: public-domain composition (Tallis d.1585); CPDL edition by K. Jaworski
pieces.notes: GOTCHA: score includes a 2-stave 'Reduction (rehearsal only)' piano part below the 4 voices. OMR will likely detect 6 parts/staves — the editorial reduction is NOT a singing voice. voice_count metric must tolerate this or the reduction must be stripped.

pieces.title: Niescie chwale
pieces.subtitle: Psalm 29
pieces.source: Towarzystwo Muzyczne im. Edwina Kowalika, http://www.idn.org.pl/towmuz/biblioteka
pieces.license_note: public-domain composition (Gomolka 16th c.); arrangement by Z. Piasecki, hosted by Towarzystwo Muzyczne im. Edwina Kowalika
pieces.notes: GOTCHA: only 3 voices (SAB), NOT SATB. Two verses of lyrics. Meter change C->2/4. Polish diacritics in lyrics.
